environmentalEquivalents.label: Trees offset
environmentalEquivalents.detail: Equivalent to planting a small grove over a year

environmentalEquivalents.label: Water saved
environmentalEquivalents.detail: From lower-impact product swaps and refill behavior

executiveSummary: Most emissions originate from imported produce and plastic packaging. Applying the highest-priority recommendations could reduce emissions by approximately 32% while also lowering overall shopping cost and preserving the basket's everyday convenience.

timeline.title: Receipt uploaded
timeline.detail: The sample receipt was ingested and parsed for product-level analysis.

timeline.title: OCR completed
timeline.detail: Receipt text and product lines were extracted with high confidence.

timeline.title: Products extracted
timeline.detail: The analysis engine organized the receipt into product-level sustainability inputs.

timeline.title: Carbon calculated
timeline.detail: The sustainability simulator estimated each product's environmental impact.

timeline.title: Recommendations generated
timeline.detail: The engine prioritized the highest-impact and easiest-to-adopt swaps.

timeline.title: Analysis complete
timeline.detail: The executive summary was finalized with a premium mock-ready action plan.
